title: jurinea hartmanii
intro: Jurinea hartmanii, also known as Jurinea or Hartman's Jurinea, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in Central Asia and China, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea hartmanii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antitumor activity, making it a subject of interest in cancer research. Jurinea hartmanii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
